lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and small dents. The interior shows visible wear and some staining. Mechanical systems are operational but may require future maintenance.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows wear on the upholstery and carpets. All mechanical systems are operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver, though it clearly reflects its age and mileage. The exterior paint shows noticeable fading on the roof and hood, and there are several minor door dings and a small scuff on the rear passenger-side bumper. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear; the driver's seat has a small tear in the fabric, and the carpets have some light staining from regular use. All major electronics work, though the air conditioning takes a few minutes to reach full cooling capacity. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives well

Step into excellence with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in flawless, showroom condition, having been meticulously cared for and kept in a climate-controlled environment. From the sparkling exterior to the factory-fresh interior, this car looks and drives exactly like it just rolled off the assembly line. A truly rare find for the discerning buyer!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like finish with zero scratches, dents, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, while all interior surfaces and electronics are in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. This is a showroom-quality example that will satisfy the most discerning collector or buyer looking for a vehicle in pristine, original state.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and reliability. With a well-preserved interior and a consistent service history, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner.

Hi everyone! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved over the years. Whether you're hitting the highway or just running errands, this car is ready for its next adventure with you! Come take a look—you're going to love how it handles!
This 987.2 Cayman S features the robust 3.4L MA1.21 flat-six engine with Direct Fuel Injection
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents an excellent balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is well-preserved with no tears, and all electronic features—including the climate control and infotainment system—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is sound, offering a smooth ride with a responsive engine and seamless gear transitions. It has been serviced regularly, with recent fluid checks and tire rotations completed to ensure it is road-ready. This is a reliable, high-quality driver that looks sharp and performs reliably for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive mechanical evaluation and retains its structural and aesthetic integrity. While it shows standard signs of previous ownership, its drivetrain remains robust and its interior appointments are in commendable condition. This represents a distinguished opportunity for a buyer seeking a high-caliber vehicle at a competitive market valuation.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and sophisticated styling. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a documented service history, this automobile represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber transport solution.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable new ride? I'm selling my car and it’s in really wonderful shape! It’s been super dependable for me, runs like a dream, and has been well-loved. It’s the perfect mix of comfort and performance, ready for its next big adventure with you. Come take it for a spin!

Offering a driver-focused E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving powerplant utilizes eight individual throttle bodies and an ionic current knock-control system to deliver linear power up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Power is managed via a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal longitudinal traction and corner-exit stability. The chassis retains its communicative feedback, supported by an aluminum-intensive multi-link rear
Used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle is the ideal choice for a driver seeking reliability and a premium feel. The exterior presents beautifully with a high-gloss finish, showing only the minor, superficial road nicks consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin remains a clean and inviting space; the upholstery is well-preserved with no rips or stains, and all onboard technology—from the infotainment system to the climate control—operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the car is mechanically sound, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts with precision, and the tires offer substantial tread life for the seasons ahead. This is a solid, turn-key vehicle that has been kept in a smoke-free environment and is ready for its next chapter.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver who values both mechanical integrity and sophisticated presentation. Meticulously maintained and showing clear evidence of careful ownership, it delivers a refined driving experience and consistent performance. The interior and exterior remain in commendable order, ensuring this automobile stands as a premier choice within its class. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that perfectly balances executive presence with enduring value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and value. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure mechanical reliability and structural integrity. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, it serves as a testament to responsible ownership. This is an exceptional opportunity for the professional seeking a dependable and sophisticated driving experience.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car that’s been so good to me over the years. It’s in really solid shape and runs like a dream, making it the perfect companion for your daily commute or fun weekend road trips! It’s been well-cared for and is looking for a new home where it can keep on rolling. You’re going to love how it handles—come take a look and see for yourself!

This Porsche 911 (996) Carrera 4S is a driver-focused machine featuring the iconic 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six, delivering power through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle and a viscous-clutch AWD system. The chassis benefits from a recent suspension overhaul featuring Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings, maintaining the legendary communicative steering and lateral grip. The IMS bearing has been proactively replaced with a dual-row ceramic upgrade, and the cooling system features a low-temp thermostat and high-flow water pump. Finished in its original wide-body configuration, it
Reliable used car. Good condition. Clean title. Service records available. Cold AC. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and remains in impressive physical and mechanical shape. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the slightest evidence of minor road use consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine is clean and responsive, benefiting from a documented history of timely synthetic oil changes and scheduled fluid flushes. The transmission shifts are smooth and predictable, while the suspension remains tight and quiet over bumps. With tires showing ample tread and brakes that bite firmly, this car is fully prepared for its next chapter without needing immediate investment. It is a dependable, high-quality example that bridges the gap between a daily driver and a weekend showpiece.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, demonstrating a commitment to mechanical excellence and aesthetic preservation. This unit offers a distinguished driving experience, characterized by its robust performance and well-preserved interior. It stands as a premier selection for those seeking a sophisticated balance of luxury and proven reliability.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and longevity. Experience the perfect balance of prestige and value in a vehicle that remains structurally and aesthetically sound.

Hey there! Thanks so much for checking out my car! 🚗 It’s been such a reliable ride and is still in wonderful shape, perfect for someone looking for a dependable vehicle that's been well-loved. I've taken great care of it, so it's all ready for your next road trip or daily commute. Can't wait to find it a great new home!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis is structurally sound with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension setup utilizing Bilstein dampers. Its variable M differential lock ensures optimal traction through corners, while the high-revving 8,000 RPM redline delivers a visceral driving experience. Mechanically sorted and maintaining excellent compression across all cylinders, this example represents a well-maintained driver’s car with sharp throttle
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Full maintenance history. Runs well.

Experience the perfect balance of luxury and reliability with this meticulously maintained vehicle. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and free of major blemishes. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple seating that has been treated regularly to maintain its texture and comfort. Every button, switch, and digital display functions exactly as intended, including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, this car is in strong health; it has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule, with a recent full synthetic oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection just completed. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a quiet and confident ride. With tires boasting plenty of tread and a documented service history, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with total peace of mind.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This specimen has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and an impressive suite of features, this motorcar represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning buyer who demands quality without compromise. We invite you to experience the superior craftsmanship and enduring performance of this distinguished automobile.
